attributes.action: Introduce a Remembrance Day for all children under 18 who have lost their lives
attributes.additional_details: There are so many families around the World suffering from the harsh effects and troubles around the globe. I believe losing a child has to be at the top of things to suffer through, and I think this day could bring families together and give every parent a better grieving process, as there would be a day to remember their children and all children who have lost their lives. It could ensure that they are still remembered for years to come, even when we do move on in life.
attributes.background: Create a Remembrance Day for all families and parents who have lost a child or children under the age of 18, including a moment of silence. This could help families grieve better as there would be a special day for their beloved young angels.
